name: Octavia
description: Octavia turns bass, beat, and melody into a symphony of devastation. The music of her Mandachord gives her high survivability and supports allies. Her composition means the enemy’s destruction.
passiveDescription: Replenish |ENERGY| energy over |DURATION|s for Octavia and allies within |RANGE|m when abilities are activated.

abilities.name: Mallet
abilities.description: Rhythmically beats damage into nearby enemies and draws their fire. Damage inflicted on the Mallet increases its lethality.

abilities.name: Resonator
abilities.description: Launches a rollerball that charms foes to follow it. Combines with the Mallet to create a roving ball of sonic destruction.

abilities.name: Metronome
abilities.description: Grants buffs to those who consistently perform actions in time to Octavia's music. Timed jumps offer the Vivace speed buff. Crouching on the beat grants cloaking with the Nocturne buff. Firing rhythmically bestows Opera multishot buff. Timed melee swings give the Forte damage buff.

abilities.name: Amp
abilities.description: Draws power from the decibel level of sound in the area and uses it to amplify a damage buff for Octavia and her allies. It also doubles the damage and range of nearby Mallets.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Octavia turns bass, beat, and melody into a symphony of devastation. The music of her Mandachord gives her high survivability and supports allies. Her composition means the enemy’s destruction.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Octavia Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Octavia Warframe.

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Octavia Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.5
patchlogs.changes:
Octavia Prime
Replaced Perrin Sequence Rank 5 sacrifice of Octavia Prime Chassis to Gara Prime Neuroptics.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Archons now prioritize players instead of summons (eg: Octavia's roller, Titania's Razorflies, Atlas Rumblers, etc) to prevent too egregious aggro CC.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2

Fixed a crash that could occur when Octavia’s Passive triggers.

Octavia’s Mandachord option has been moved into the top Arsenal menu, under the Parazon option.
The Mandachord is a very important piece of equipment for Octavia’s abilities

Fixed incorrect spacing in Ordis’ subtitles during the ‘Octavia’s Anthem’ Quest.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Players have asked for this for a while and now you can control your own Mandachord volume in the game instead of having to adjust the main Sound Effects audio slider. This also includes Subsumed Octavia Resonator.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow

know someone who is great with an Octavia? Remember if someone is always in it for the long haul? Add Notes today!
but spoilers mean we won't say too much. If you've finished Octavia's Anthem, you'll find Cephalon Suda offering a new Room. Once you finish Chains of Harrow, Red Veil will offer a new Captura room!

Fixed Octavia’s ability FX and music continuing indefinitely if cast before a Host migration.

Fixed Octavia’s ability music not being synchronized between Client/Host.

Octavia'S Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4:
Sentients no longer drop rewards in the Octavia’s Anthem quest as the Replay feature created a scenario where items could be gathered endlessly in forced conditions.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a variety of random crashes that occurred most frequently at the end of the Octavia's Anthem Quest but would have caused pain and suffering throughout the game.

Octavia’S Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.1:
Reduced the ambient audio level when using Octavia’s abilities.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to play the last phase of Octavia’s Anthem without completing the quest.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Octavia'S Anthem: Update 20:
Octavia’s Anthem is a replayable quest! If you would like to experience it again, visit your Codex and select “Replay Quest”.
Get Octavia today by purchasing her in the Market for Platinum, or by completing Octavia’s Anthem to get her Blueprint. Her parts can be found in the following ways:
Conduct your very own symphony, Tenno. Octavia’s abilities are powered by the Mandachord, a formidable tool used to mix Melody, Bass, and Percussion into a harmony of destruction. Compose a song before entering the battle by going to your Arsenal, selecting the Appearance tab, and hitting the “Mandachord” button.
In this guide, we will be using the Adau Instruments to get you started on composition since they are the default Mandachord Instruments. There are also 4 other Instruments available in the Market for Platinum if you own Octavia:
In order to send and receive songs, you must own Octavia.
An alternate helmet for Octavia.
The Relays and Maroo’s Bazaar now offer dedicated music zones, where you can share your Mandachord compositions and boogie down with fellow Tenno. Simply bring Octavia to one of the areas marked with the symbol seen in the image below, and select any of the Narta emotes listed above to start the party.
